description_long: This bungalow features a modern, angular design with a prominent slanted roof that extends over the entire structure. The roof is composed of large, overlapping panels with visible ridges, giving it a textured appearance. The building sits on a rectangular base, with open sections on two sides that reveal partial interior spaces, including what appears to be a living area and entryway. The exterior walls are a mix of solid and open segments, with some areas featuring angled supports and partial partitions. The color palette is primarily shades of gray and beige, with darker accents on structural supports. The overall form is geometric and minimalist, with a focus on clean lines and open, airy spaces.
description: A modern, angular bungalow with a slanted, ridged roof and open, geometric exterior walls in shades of gray and beige.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open entry area, angled supports, and a clear view of the slanted roof's ridges.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the wide roof overhang, with minimal visible openings and a mostly solid facade.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing more of the open living area and angular wall segments beneath the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the long, sloped roof and a large, angled wall partition beneath it.
